disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus self-isolation complete for 34 Canadians, Health Canada says - Global News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus self-isolation complete for 34 Canadians, Health Canada says Global News
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大卫生部称34名汉坦病毒隔离者已解除隔离。

updates.title_en: Exclusive | CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as U.S. Outbreak Risk Diminishes - WSJ
updates.body_en: Exclusive | CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as U.S. Outbreak Risk Diminishes WSJ
updates.summary_zh: 美国CDC因疫情风险降低结束汉坦病毒应急响应。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus quarantined patients released from isolation after 42 days - WTHR
updates.body_en: Hantavirus quarantined patients released from isolation after 42 days WTHR
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒隔离患者42天后解除隔离。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus quarantine ends; no cases in the US - WPXI
updates.body_en: Hantavirus quarantine ends; no cases in the US WPXI
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒隔离结束，美国无病例。

updates.title_en: CDC ends US hantavirus response - The Hill
updates.body_en: CDC ends US hantavirus response The Hill
updates.summary_zh: 美国CDC结束汉坦病毒应急响应。

updates.title_en: WHO says hantavirus outbreak to be declared over by July 2 if no new cases emerge - Anadolu Ajansı
updates.body_en: WHO says hantavirus outbreak to be declared over by July 2 if no new cases emerge Anadolu Ajansı
updates.summary_zh: WHO称若无新病例，汉坦病毒疫情将于7月2日宣布结束。

updates.title_en: CDC Officially Ends Hantavirus Response as Outbreak Risk Recedes - AJMC
updates.body_en: CDC Officially Ends Hantavirus Response as Outbreak Risk Recedes AJMC
updates.summary_zh: 美国CDC正式结束汉坦病毒应急响应。

updates.title_en: US CDC to end hantavirus response, WSJ reports - The Mighty 790 KFGO
updates.body_en: US CDC to end hantavirus response, WSJ reports The Mighty 790 KFGO
updates.summary_zh: 美国CDC将结束汉坦病毒应急响应。

updates.title_en: CDC Concludes Response to Hantavirus Outbreak from Cruise Ship - Devdiscourse
updates.body_en: CDC Concludes Response to Hantavirus Outbreak from Cruise Ship Devdiscourse
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束对邮轮汉坦病毒疫情的应对。

updates.title_en: US CDC to wind down hantavirus response as outbreak eases - Reuters
updates.body_en: US CDC to wind down hantavirus response as outbreak eases Reuters
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 将逐步结束汉坦病毒应对，疫情缓解。

updates.title_en: HHS Successfully Concludes Hantavirus Response Effort; Monitoring Ends with No Positive U.S. Case - HHS.gov
updates.body_en: HHS Successfully Concludes Hantavirus Response Effort; Monitoring Ends with No Positive U.S. Case HHS.gov
updates.summary_zh: 美国 HHS 结束汉坦病毒应对，监测无阳性病例。

updates.title_en: CDC prepares to end its hantavirus response as American passengers celebrate the end of quarantine - 10TV
updates.body_en: CDC prepares to end its hantavirus response as American passengers celebrate the end of quarantine 10TV
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 准备结束汉坦病毒应对，乘客庆祝隔离结束。

updates.title_en: International public health response helped contain Andes hantavirus outbreak on Dutch cruise ship - CIDRAP
